strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems, meeting the minimum requirement.
Demonstrates strong initiative and leadership through founding an open-source platform (GISCollective) and creating/leading multiple technical workshops.
Recent experience in AI-agent infrastructure and tooling at re:cinq, showing a pivot towards the required domain.
concerns: Lacks deep, demonstrated expertise in building AI-powered products; AI experience appears very recent and focused on infrastructure rather than core product development.
Experience is primarily as a hands-on Senior/Staff developer, not a Director-level strategic individual contributor as the role requires.
No evidence of advising strategic customers or defining the future state of cloud products, which are key responsibilities.
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly skilled and proactive software craftsman with extensive, diverse experience and a strong educational background from MIT. He clearly meets the years of experience requirement and shows leadership potential through his open-source work and workshops. However, there is a significant mismatch with the core responsibilities and seniority of this Principal Engineer role. His experience lacks the required depth in AI product development and, more critically, the strategic, director-level scope of influencing product direction and advising customers. His background is that of an excellent hands-on implementer, not a high-level AI strategist.
